item.title: Time for another unhinged XL Sunday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
I would die for Juanita
what is the world coming to? Coke
my usual sleepover outfit
get it?
not a bad way to go
concerts are the best but I prefer them from the musicians perspective
I miss my G-ma
mmm hmm
of the highest order
we all know why
youngin'
hairbrella
life peak
i love how the top speed was 6.8 mph
it better work
apparently
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Love this! Clothes are clothes, they are not neutral exclusive, if you want to wear something, then do it!!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: Victory, thank you all!
item.description: First two weeks went great! My first big presentation is Monday (I'll be read), basically a 90 day marketing plan. Also got luggage, paid off phone bill, bought some food, and clothes, and I still have more than enough left over to make sure I'm not in crisis til next pay. Can't wait to pay back the other loans in next few weeks, thank you so much Imgur for all the love, support, kind words. I'm just... elated, relieved, excited, and so so very thankful. If I manage money properly might even be a pizza angel again this week! EDIT: I guess this has gone viral. I know many people have followed and messaged throughout the last 3 months. Thank you. I know folk have supported me, and thank you. But I also know "pizza" and "OEU" have too, so thank you specifically. I am lucky to be part of this community, and I look forward to giving back and more.
item.dc:creator: BananaForScaIe

item.title: I managed to lose 50lbs in a year!
item.description: I was so sure I wouldn’t reach 50lbs in time for my “anniversary” but I had a whoosh this month and week. (6.5lbs in a month and 2.9lbs in a week!) I now need to focus on getting more exercise and just moving more in general. (And continuing to lose weight, obviously.)
item.dc:creator: ssmc

item.title: Flexible bottom shelf memes
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
How dare you make me feel emotions @JKBenton I went out seeking memes, and I accidentally stumbled into utter wholesomeness. ❤️
The owl originally said "I'll do it again." Boo.
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Saturdays & Sundays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Tuesdays - Thursdays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Follow our channel to be notified next time me, Frothy, and our favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community go live!
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax.
Still unsure about joining the Bottom Shelf Community server? Check out our museum of stupidity. https://imgur.com/gallery/FYpqqAf Join for the games! Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tax channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the meme challenges! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Woke Up To This Bullshit
item.description: Can’t call customer service until tomorrow to ask HOW IN THE FUCK they won’t cover a visit at one of their own clinics. This is the reason I don’t go to the doctor. I’m so fucking angry.

item.title: ICM QUALITY MIX - Vol.37 CROSSED WIRES
item.description:
COVER ARTIST: PASCAL BLANCHE
ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] DOSES & MIMOSAS - CHERUB YouTube: https://youtu.be/8h3t2h4NKPY?si=zA-kahAOQzyrSU0B Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/44CZRkOxv7UItaAUmh8PgN?si=a8d85b289ba04166
ICM Original / https://twitter.com/PathosMeta
PASCAL BLANCHE
Alexey Egorov
Col Price
Aku
Alexander Mandradjiev
G MDK
Occultya
Andre Yamaguchi
Koala Laurelin
Aleriia V
Dante Liu
Ting Xie
DOFRESH
Some Observer
Huleeb
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 *TOGGLE MATURE CONTENT IN SETTINGS TO VIEW OUR POSTS* ICM SQUAD: @vazquezdaniel, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @onewallpaperaweek, @thedownlowe, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @bagoffishstix, @JayKillBam, @majkongskull, @DingoJ0nes, @HandsomePenguin, @MrJwinkyface, @Gorgoror, @ciadmillefailte, @kaeldra ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Just to let you know, we do not take credit for any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort of compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: For Me to Laugh at Later 47
item.description: Iraq, Afghanistan, Syria, now probably Iran. Tired of being wrapped up in conflict in the desert. Military intervention ain't working but that's what the fossils in power want.
